purpose: 99a SIM-SPEC frozen-run environment staging + validation (SETUP ONLY; full grid NOT run).

image.r_package_source: Posit Package Manager snapshot p3m.dev jammy 2024-10-30; lme4 compiled from source, deps as binaries

pins_required_vs_installed.Matrix_note: 1.7.0 (2024-10-30 snapshot); lme4 compiled against it (consistent). Not separately pinned by S2.

b2_lme4_fixture_equivalence.definition: S4.2 fixture: config_index 0 (F1, gaussian, rho=0, base n), replications 0..49, UCT (10-arm) + composite (8-arm) ledger families. Python balanced pooled-ANOVA (inference.FamilyAnova, the pipeline's operative estimator) vs R lme4/lmerTest REML (ddf=Satterthwaite), 12 registered contrasts/rep = 600 comparisons.
b2_lme4_fixture_equivalence.direction: CONSERVATIVE: in every worst case the mock's pooled-ANOVA SE is LARGER and Satterthwaite df SMALLER than lme4 REML (super-uniform p preserved).
b2_lme4_fixture_equivalence.worst_family: COMPOSITE (nonce) family. Worst contrasts H-vs-A2IR (Delta^G), H-vs-S(H), A2IR-vs-S(A2IR). Root cause = documented conservatism (SPEC-DEFECTS B2): the composite residual is heteroscedastic (reviewed vs unreviewed arms) and the mock pools ONE residual, breaking the balanced-data REML=ANOVA identity. UCT family (homoscedastic residual) agrees far more closely.
b2_lme4_fixture_equivalence.interpretation: theta_hat is numerically exact (1.5e-13 << 1e-7); SE/df/p breach the pinned fixture gate by 3-4 orders of magnitude. The mock's balanced pooled-ANOVA is NOT the S4.2 joint lme4 REML to tolerance. This CONFIRMS the deferred SPEC-DEFECTS B2 concern with a first-time MEASURED result on the pinned stack. It is a pre-freeze DESIGN decision (route to Fable/coordinator), NOT an environment blocker.

modal_timing_bench_1vcpu_per_rep.host_comparison: host mock measured fwer_base 95.8ms, fwer_esc 154ms, power_esc 139ms -> Modal hardware is comparable (slightly faster on escalated cells).

full_grid_cost_estimate.grid: FWER 50 base + 24 esc (R=40000) + Power 18 base + 18 esc (R=10000) + Gate-cal 4 (R=40000) + 28 bounded-Beta 1e7 recalibs
full_grid_cost_estimate.parallelization_plan: Embarrassingly parallel per (config_index, replication). modal.Function.map over ~1740 (config_index, rep_start, rep_end) chunks of ~2000 reps each (each chunk ~3-6 min). Request cpu=2 (=1 physical core, 2 vCPU) and run a 2-way internal worker pool per container to fully utilise the billed core; auto-scale to ~100 containers (respect account concurrency). Seeds are per (config_index, replication) so chunking is bit-exact and order-independent (S2).

small_slice_validation.note: Pinned Modal image (CPython 3.12.1 / numpy 2.1.3 / scipy 1.14.1) vs committed host mocks (CPython 3.9.25 / numpy 2.0.2 / scipy 1.13.1). Bit-identity is NOT expected across stacks/code revisions; the STATISTICAL acceptance picture is what must reproduce.

F5_binding_true_null_R600.verdict: pinned MORE conservative (current R9a gate + futility ON); both <= 0.055 -> CONTROLLED

P3_power_R500.verdict: SAME machinery (gate opens ~0.998, stage2 fires iff a C-CON-SUP rejects, graph<con). Power point-estimates LOWER than host mock -- consistent with futility+Rung-0 now DEFAULT-ON (binding-conservative) and cross-version RNG. Qualitative picture reproduced; magnitudes differ (NOT bit-identical, as expected).

gatecal_rho0.1_n96.verdict: TIGHT MATCH: ALL_PASS, SD-ratio >= 1.2 (over-dispersed, R9a mechanism), worst cp within bars (0.031/0.0078)

acceptance_on_pinned_image.VERDICT: The FWER-control and gate-calibration statistical picture REPRODUCES and PASSES on the pinned image. Power point-estimates differ in magnitude (futility/rung0 default-ON + cross-version RNG) but qualitative behaviour is correct.

teardown.apps: All apps ephemeral (modal run) and auto-stopped (state=stopped, 0 tasks). No modal deploy, no running containers, no schedules.
teardown.volumes: NONE created by this task (kot-knull-v2-ckpt / kot-scale-wikidata / kot-hf-cache pre-date it and belong to other work -- left untouched).
teardown.image: im-k5wxPoFZ7ncQlZ2EJFSkXN remains in Modal's image cache by design (so the full frozen run reuses it instantly; a cache, not a billed resource).
teardown.status: COMPLETE -- nothing of this task's persists as a billed resource.

estimated_validation_spend: ~a few dollars (one image build + 4 short validation runs, each seconds-to-minutes of 1-2 core compute). Full grid NOT run.

GREEN_LIGHT.environment: VERIFIED GREEN. Pinned stack confirmed EXACT (Py 3.12.1 / numpy 2.1.3 / scipy 1.14.1 / R 4.4.1 / lme4 1.1-35.5 / lmerTest 3.1-3). FWER control (global-null 0.000; strong-FWER + binding cells cp_upper <= 0.055) and gate-cal (ALL_PASS, SD-ratio >= 1.2) reproduce and pass on the pinned image. Full grid ~$3 and ~15-60 min wall-clock.
GREEN_LIGHT.full_frozen_run: GATED -- do NOT launch yet. The B2 lme4 fixture-equivalence FAILS the pinned S4.2 tolerances (theta_hat exact to 1.5e-13, but SE breaches by up to 5.9%, Satterthwaite df by up to 16.6%, p by up to 1.4%). Per S4.2 a fixture breach halts the build (S9 reportable defect). The mock's balanced pooled-ANOVA is a CONSERVATIVE-but-DIFFERENT estimator than the S4.2 joint lme4 REML, worst in the composite family's heteroscedastic (reviewed vs unreviewed) residual. This is a DESIGN/ESTIMATOR decision for Fable/coordinator, NOT an environment fault. Options: (a) run joint lme4 REML in-loop (cost-prohibitive), (b) implement an exact joint-REML closed form handling the composite heteroscedastic residual (e.g. per-stratum residual), or (c) amend S4.2 to accept the conservative estimator with a gridwide FWER demonstration.
GREEN_LIGHT.bottom_line: Environment is one green-light away for the full run; the remaining blocker is the B2 estimator (design), which this staging surfaced as a first-time MEASURED result on the pinned stack.
